Package event

Interface Event

All Known Implementing Classes:
AfterMovementEvent, CardEnterEvent, CardExitEvent, EngineEvent, GameWinEvent, LogicEvent, ModifyEndedEvent, MovementEndedEvent, PathwayEvent, PausedEvent, RenderEvent, ResetEvent, TileSelectChangeEvent
public interface Event
A base interface for all events within the system. Events are used to communicate state changes or actions between different components.
